sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const SubmissionModal = ({ submission, onClose }) => { if (!submission) return null; const getModuleStatus = (complete) => { return complete === 1 ? '✓ Complete' : '○ Incomplete'; }; const getModuleClass = (complete) => { return complete === 1 ? 'module-complete' : 'module-incomplete'; }; return (
e.stopPropagation()}> {/* Header */}

{submission.Product}

{submission.Protocol_ID} · {submission.Country}

{/* Content Grid */}
{/* Submission Info */}

Submission Information

Protocol ID: {submission.Protocol_ID}
Product: {submission.Product}
Product Type: {submission.Product_Type}
Therapeutic Area: {submission.Sector}
Country: {submission.Country}
Region: {submission.Global_Region}
Regulatory Agency: {submission.Regulatory_Authority}
Submission Date: {submission.Submission_Date}
{/* Status & Timeline */}

Review Status

Current Status: {submission.Submission_Status}
Clock Stop Days: {submission.Clock_Stop_Days ?? '—'} days
Review Pathway: {submission.Review_Pathway ?? '—'}
Resubmission Cycle: {submission.Resubmission_Cycle ?? '—'}
Risk Score: {submission.Risk_Score_Overall ?? '—'}/10
{/* Financial Impact */}

Financial Impact

Peak Sales Potential: {submission.Peak_Sales_Millions != null ? `${submission.Peak_Sales_Millions.toFixed(1)}M` : '—'}
Daily Revenue Rate: {submission.Peak_Sales_Millions != null ? `${(submission.Peak_Sales_Millions / 365).toFixed(0)}K/day` : '—'}
{/* CRL Status */}

CRL Status

CRL Received: {submission.CRL_Received_Fl === 1 ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
{submission.CRL_Category && (
CRL Category: {submission.CRL_Category}
)}
GMP Site Status: {submission.GMP_Site_Status}
{/* eCTD Module Completeness */}

eCTD Module Completeness

3
Quality (CMC)
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module3_CMC_Complete_Fl)}
5
Clinical
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module5_Clinical_Complete_Fl)}
{submission.Open_Deficiencies_Cnt > 0 && (
⚠ {submission.Open_Deficiencies_Cnt} open deficiencies
)}
{/* Footer Actions */}
); }; export default SubmissionModal;
